home.about_p2: All tools are available directly in your browser without any registration or installation, and your data is processed only within your browser for privacy.

percentage_calculator.title: Percentage Calculator
percentage_calculator.meta_title: Percentage Calculator - Free Online Tool - QuickBestGo
percentage_calculator.meta_description: Calculate percentages quickly with our free online tool. Support for percentage of, percentage change, and more.
percentage_calculator.about_title: How to use the Percentage Calculator?
percentage_calculator.about_p1: QuickBestGo's Percentage Calculator is a versatile tool designed to handle common percentage-related calculations. Whether you need to find a percentage of a number, determine what percentage one number is of another, or calculate percentage increases and decreases, this tool has you covered.
percentage_calculator.about_p2: The calculator now provides three modes: percent of a number, increase by percent, and decrease by percent. Enter your values and see results instantly.
percentage_calculator.about_p3: Examples: 15% of 200 = 30, 200 increased by 15% = 230, 200 decreased by 15% = 170.

qr_code_generator.title: QR Code Generator
qr_code_generator.meta_title: QR Code Generator - Create QR Codes Online - QuickBestGo
qr_code_generator.meta_description: Create high-quality QR codes for any text, URL, or contact information with our free online tool. Download as PNG.
qr_code_generator.about_title: How to use the QR Code Generator?
qr_code_generator.about_p1: QuickBestGo's QR Code Generator allows you to instantly create QR codes for any text or URL you provide. Simply enter your content, and the QR code will be generated in real-time.
qr_code_generator.about_p2: You can use these QR codes for sharing website links, text messages, or any other information that can be scanned by a smartphone camera. It's a fast and efficient way to bridge physical and digital content.
qr_code_generator.about_p3: Your data is processed locally in your browser, ensuring that your information is never sent to our servers. Once generated, you can download the QR code as a PNG file for use in your projects.
qr_code_generator.error_dangerous_url: This URL scheme is not allowed for security reasons.

random_number_generator.title: Random Number Generator
random_number_generator.meta_description: Generate a random number within your custom range quickly and easily. Free online tool for random selection, gaming, and more.
random_number_generator.about_title: What is a Random Number Generator?
random_number_generator.about_p1: QuickBestGo's Random Number Generator is a tool that quickly and accurately generates random numbers between a minimum and maximum value specified by the user.
random_number_generator.about_p2: This tool can be used for various purposes, such as simple number selection, complex probability calculations, random event generation in games, or random number drawing for prize draws.
random_number_generator.about_p3: Our random number generator reflects the range entered by the user immediately and is designed to store the history of the generated numbers up to the latest 5 so that you can easily check previous results.
random_number_generator.error_min_max: Maximum must be greater than Minimum

password_generator.title: Password Generator
password_generator.meta_description: Create secure and customizable passwords with our free online tool. Choose length and character types for maximum security.
password_generator.about_p1: In an era where digital security is more important than ever, a secure password is the first line of defense to protect your personal information. QuickBestGo's Password Generator maximizes your account security by generating unpredictable and complex passwords in seconds.
password_generator.about_p2: Our tool provides options to freely select whether to include uppercase letters, numbers, and special symbols, and you can set the desired length from 8 to up to 50 characters.
password_generator.about_p3: Since all password generation is performed in your local browser engine, there is no worry that the generated password will be recorded on the server or leaked through the network.

age_calculator.title: Age Calculator
age_calculator.meta_description: Calculate your exact age in years, months, and days with our free online tool. Just enter your birth date.
age_calculator.about_title: How does the Age Calculator work?
age_calculator.about_p1: QuickBestGo's Age Calculator is a tool that allows you to calculate your exact age in years, months, and days by simply entering your date of birth.
age_calculator.about_p2: The calculator takes into account the different number of days in months and leap years to provide highly accurate results.
age_calculator.about_p3: Your data is not sent to any server; the calculation happens entirely in your browser.

coin_flip.title: Coin Flip
coin_flip.meta_title: Coin Flip - Heads or Tails - QuickBestGo
coin_flip.meta_description: Flip a digital coin for heads or tails with our free online tool. Perfect for quick decision making and games.
coin_flip.about_title: How to use the Coin Flip tool?
coin_flip.about_p1: QuickBestGo's Coin Flip is a simple digital tool that allows you to flip a coin and get a random result of Heads or Tails.
coin_flip.about_p2: This tool is perfect for making quick decisions, settling bets, or as a random element in games when you don't have a physical coin on hand.
coin_flip.about_p3: The results are generated using a cryptographically secure random number generator in your browser, ensuring fairness and unpredictability.

wheel_spinner.title: Wheel Spinner
wheel_spinner.meta_title: Wheel Spinner - Random Name Picker - QuickBestGo
wheel_spinner.meta_description: Spin a custom wheel to pick a random winner or make a quick decision with our free online tool. Enter your own options.
wheel_spinner.about_title: How to use the Wheel Spinner?
wheel_spinner.about_p1: QuickBestGo's Wheel Spinner is a fun and interactive way to make a random selection from a list of options.
wheel_spinner.about_p2: Simply enter your choices, one per line, and spin the wheel to pick a random winner. It's great for classrooms, giveaways, or deciding what to have for dinner!
wheel_spinner.about_p3: Like all our tools, it runs entirely in your browser and doesn't store any of your inputs on our servers.

bmi_calculator.title: BMI Calculator
bmi_calculator.meta_title: BMI Calculator - Free Body Mass Index Tool - QuickBestGo
bmi_calculator.meta_description: Calculate your Body Mass Index (BMI) instantly with our free online tool. Supports both metric (cm/kg) and imperial (ft/lb) units.
bmi_calculator.about_title: What is BMI and how is it calculated?
bmi_calculator.about_p1: Body Mass Index (BMI) is a simple numerical value calculated from a person's height and weight. It is widely used as a screening tool to identify weight categories that may lead to health problems. The formula is: BMI = weight (kg) / height (m)².
bmi_calculator.about_p2: BMI categories are defined by the World Health Organization (WHO): Underweight is below 18.5, Normal weight is 18.5–24.9, Overweight is 25–29.9, and Obese is 30 or above. These ranges apply to most adults aged 18–65.
bmi_calculator.about_p3: BMI is a useful screening tool but does not directly measure body fat or overall health. Factors such as muscle mass, age, sex, and ethnicity can affect the interpretation. Always consult a healthcare professional for a comprehensive health assessment.
bmi_calculator.error_invalid: Please enter valid height and weight values.

footer.tagline: Fast, Simple, and Free Utility Tools.

meta.title: QuickBestGo - Fast & Simple Utility Tools
meta.description: A collection of simple, fast, and free online utility tools. Random number generator, password generator, age calculator, and more.

about_page.meta_description: Learn about QuickBestGo, our mission to provide free, fast, and privacy-friendly utility tools for everyone.
about_page.title: About QuickBestGo
about_page.mission_p1: QuickBestGo was created with a simple goal: to provide fast, free, and easy-to-use online utility tools for everyone, without registration, without installation, and without compromising your privacy.
about_page.mission_p2: We believe that everyday digital tools should be accessible to everyone, everywhere. That's why all our tools work directly in your browser and support multiple languages.
about_page.tools_p1: We currently offer 7 free utility tools: Random Number Generator, Password Generator, Coin Flip, Wheel Spinner, Age Calculator, QR Code Generator, and Percentage Calculator. We are continuously working to add more useful tools.
about_page.privacy_p1: All calculations and operations are performed locally in your browser. We do not collect, store, or transmit any of the data you input into our tools. Your privacy is our priority.

contact_page.meta_description: Contact the QuickBestGo team for questions, feedback, or support.
contact_page.title: Contact Us
contact_page.subtitle: Have a question, suggestion, or feedback? We'd love to hear from you.
contact_page.response_time: We typically respond within 1–3 business days.
contact_page.feedback_p1: We are always looking to improve QuickBestGo. If you have ideas for new tools or improvements to existing ones, please reach out — we'd love to hear your suggestions.

privacy_policy_page.meta_description: Read the QuickBestGo privacy policy to understand how we handle your data and use of Google AdSense.
privacy_policy_page.title: Privacy Policy
privacy_policy_page.intro: At QuickBestGo, we are committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you use our website at https://quickbestgo.com.
privacy_policy_page.s1_content: QuickBestGo does not collect or store any personal information through our tools. All tool operations — including number generation, password creation, age calculation, and QR code generation — are performed entirely within your browser. No data you enter is transmitted to our servers.
privacy_policy_page.s2_content: We may use cookies and similar tracking technologies to analyze website traffic and improve your experience. We use Google Analytics to understand how visitors interact with our site. This data is aggregated and anonymous. You can opt out of Google Analytics by installing the Google Analytics Opt-out Browser Add-on.
privacy_policy_page.s3_content: We use Google AdSense to display advertisements on our website. Google AdSense uses cookies to serve ads based on your prior visits to this and other websites. You can opt out of personalized advertising by visiting Google's Ads Settings at https://www.google.com/settings/ads.
privacy_policy_page.s4_content: Our website may contain links to third-party websites. We are not responsible for the privacy practices or content of those sites. We encourage you to review the privacy policies of any third-party sites you visit.
privacy_policy_page.s5_content: Our services are not directed to children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13.
privacy_policy_page.s6_content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page with an updated effective date.
privacy_policy_page.contact_content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at: contact@quickbestgo.com

calorie_calculator.title: Calorie Calculator
calorie_calculator.meta_title: Calorie Calculator - Daily Calorie Needs (BMR & TDEE) - QuickBestGo
calorie_calculator.meta_description: Calculate your daily calorie needs based on age, height, weight, and activity level. Free online BMR and TDEE calculator.
calorie_calculator.about_title: How does the Calorie Calculator work?
calorie_calculator.about_p1: Our Calorie Calculator uses the Mifflin-St Jeor equation, the most accurate formula for estimating your Basal Metabolic Rate (BMR) — the number of calories your body burns at complete rest.
calorie_calculator.about_p2: Your BMR is multiplied by an activity factor to calculate your Total Daily Energy Expenditure (TDEE). This is the number of calories you need to maintain your current weight.
calorie_calculator.about_p3: To lose weight, aim for a 500 kcal/day deficit. To gain weight, add 500 kcal/day. All calculations are performed locally in your browser and no data is sent to our servers.
calorie_calculator.error_invalid: Please enter valid values for all fields.

compound_interest_calculator.title: Compound Interest Calculator
compound_interest_calculator.meta_title: Compound Interest Calculator - Free Investment Growth Tool - QuickBestGo
compound_interest_calculator.meta_description: Calculate the future value of your investment with our free compound interest calculator. See how your money grows over time with different compounding frequencies.
compound_interest_calculator.about_p1: Compound interest is interest calculated on both the initial principal and the accumulated interest from previous periods. Unlike simple interest, compound interest grows exponentially over time, which is why it is often called 'the eighth wonder of the world'.
compound_interest_calculator.about_p2: The formula is: A = P(1 + r/n)^(nt), where P is the principal, r is the annual interest rate, n is the number of times interest compounds per year, and t is the time in years. The more frequently interest compounds, the greater the final amount.
compound_interest_calculator.about_p3: This calculator is for informational and educational purposes only. Results are estimates based on the inputs provided and do not constitute financial advice.
compound_interest_calculator.error_invalid: Please enter valid positive numbers for all fields.

tip_calculator.title: Tip Calculator
tip_calculator.meta_title: Tip Calculator - Split Bill & Calculate Tip - QuickBestGo
tip_calculator.meta_description: Calculate the tip amount and split your bill easily with our free tip calculator. Choose your tip percentage and divide among any number of people.
tip_calculator.about_title: How to use the Tip Calculator?
tip_calculator.about_p1: Our Tip Calculator makes it easy to calculate a tip and split a bill among multiple people. Simply enter the total bill amount, select or enter your desired tip percentage, and choose how many people are splitting the bill.
tip_calculator.about_p2: Tipping customs vary by country and culture. In the United States, 15–20% is standard for restaurant service. In other countries, tipping may not be customary or a service charge may already be included.
tip_calculator.about_p3: All calculations are performed instantly in your browser. No data is sent to any server.
tip_calculator.error_invalid: Please enter a valid bill amount.

unit_converter.title: Unit Converter
unit_converter.meta_title: Unit Converter - Length, Weight, Temperature & Volume - QuickBestGo
unit_converter.meta_description: Convert between metric and imperial units instantly. Free online converter for length (km/mi), weight (kg/lb), temperature (°C/°F), and volume (L/gal).
unit_converter.about_title: How to use the Unit Converter?
unit_converter.about_p1: Our Unit Converter supports four categories: Length (kilometers, miles, meters, feet, centimeters, inches), Weight (kilograms, pounds, grams, ounces), Temperature (Celsius, Fahrenheit, Kelvin), and Volume (liters, US gallons, milliliters, fluid ounces).
unit_converter.about_p2: Select a category, enter your value, choose the source and target units, and the result is calculated instantly. You can also swap the units with a single click.
unit_converter.about_p3: All conversions use internationally accepted conversion factors. Results are rounded to 4 decimal places for precision.

gpa_calculator.title: GPA Calculator
gpa_calculator.meta_title: GPA Calculator - Calculate Your Grade Point Average - QuickBestGo
gpa_calculator.meta_description: Calculate your GPA on a 4.0 scale with our free online GPA calculator. Add courses with grades and credit hours for an accurate cumulative GPA.
gpa_calculator.about_p1: GPA (Grade Point Average) is calculated by multiplying each course's grade points by its credit hours, summing those values, and dividing by the total credit hours. For example: A (4.0) × 3 credits + B (3.0) × 4 credits = 24 points ÷ 7 credits = 3.43 GPA.
gpa_calculator.about_p3: GPA scales and grading systems vary by institution and country. This calculator uses the common US 4.0 scale as a general reference.
gpa_calculator.error_no_courses: Please add at least one course.
gpa_calculator.error_invalid_credits: Please enter valid credit hours for all courses.
